title: If monday.com built a Finance App — What Would It Look Like?
excerpt:

posts.author: TarunNagar (Tarun Nagar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,

I’ve been thinking a lot about how much we already rely on monday.com for project tracking, team collaboration, and automation — but when it comes to financial workflows, we still need to rely on external tools like QuickBooks, Xero, or Excel sheets.

So here’s a fun (and serious) question for the community:

If Monday.com decided to build its own “Finance Hub” or “Finance App,” what would you want it to include?

Would it look like an integrated accounting system?
A smart budgeting dashboard?
A tool that tracks invoices, expenses, and payments automatically from your boards?

Let’s imagine together.
